title: CRM1: Application for Advice and Assistance
description: Application for criminal legal aid advice and assistance. Used for initial client instruction at the police station.

title: CRM1: Application for Advice and Assistance (PDF)
description: Downloadable PDF version of the CRM1 form for advice and assistance applications.

title: CRM2: Application for Advocacy Assistance
description: Application for advocacy assistance in the magistrates' court and for specified tribunal proceedings.

title: CRM2: Application for Advocacy Assistance (PDF)
description: Downloadable PDF version of the CRM2 advocacy assistance application form.

title: CRM14: eForm for Legal Aid in Criminal Proceedings
description: Electronic form for applying for legal aid for representation in criminal proceedings.

title: CRM14: Application for Legal Aid in Criminal Proceedings (PDF)
description: Downloadable PDF of the CRM14 application for legal aid representation in the Crown Court.

title: Means Test Form A
description: Financial eligibility assessment form for legal aid applicants.

title: CRM14 Financial Eligibility (Means Test) Form
description: The means test form to determine financial eligibility for criminal legal aid. Complete online via the GOV.UK portal.

title: CRM4: Claim for Costs in the Crown Court
description: Claim for costs in the Crown Court under a representation order.

title: CRM4: Crown Court Litigator Graduated Fee Claim (PDF)
description: Downloadable PDF for claiming graduated fees in the Crown Court under a representation order.

title: CRM5: Claim for Costs in the Magistrates' Court
description: Claim for costs in the magistrates' court under a representation order.

title: CRM5: Magistrates' Court Payment Claim (PDF)
description: Downloadable PDF for claiming costs in the magistrates' court.

title: CRM7: Crown Court Advocate Graduated Fee Claim
description: Claim for advocate costs in the Crown Court under the graduated fee scheme.

title: All Criminal Legal Aid Forms (GOV.UK Collection)
description: Complete collection of all criminal legal aid forms published by the Legal Aid Agency on GOV.UK.

title: Police Station Proforma (Law Society)
description: Template for recording key information during police station attendance. Published by the Law Society.

title: LAA Online Portal — Submit Claims & Applications
description: Access the Legal Aid Agency online portal for submitting claims, billing, and applications electronically.
